title: Extracting Financial Transactions from CSV Data
scenario: Extract financial transactions from a sample CSV data set containing transaction history and account information. Output should include total transactions per month, top 5 transactions with highest amounts, and total revenue generated by transactions under $100. The output should be formatted as a table with headers and should be limited to 150 words.
constraints: Must contain total transactions per month
Must include top 5 transactions with highest amounts

evaluationCriteria.description: Judge checks if the output adheres to the specified constraints.
Judge checks if the output contains valid markdown syntax.
Judge checks if the extracted data is accurate and based on the provided CSV data.
